hero.description: I live at the intersection of **frontend** and **backend** with TypeScript. I build clean, scalable __React__ interfaces and reliable __Node.js__ APIs that ship to production.

fileBanner: // Fresher Fullstack Developer | Problem Solver | Coffee & Code Enthusiast
professionalSummary: I'm a **fresher fullstack developer** passionate about building high-performance web applications. My expertise spans from crafting seamless user interfaces to architecting scalable backend systems.

Specializing in **Next.js**, **React**, **NestJS**, **ExpressJS**, **MySQL**, and **PostgreSQL**, I focus on writing clean, type-safe code and delivering products that prioritize user experience. I believe great software solves real problems elegantly.
milestones: Built **10+ projects** across personal, freelance, and learning contexts covering frontend, backend, and fullstack development
Mastered the **TypeScript** ecosystem from React frontends to NestJS backends with Prisma ORM
Explored **cloud deployments** on Render, Clever Cloud, and AWS for various side projects
Constantly improving through **open-source contributions** on GitHub (smoluca123)

projects.title: SMOSpace – Social Network
projects.description: A fullstack social networking platform with real-time features, rich post management, live chat, and deep social interactions
projects.problemSolved: Built a complete social platform from scratch with auth, posts (re-post, send post to message, reactions), comments (nested reply up to 4 levels), friend system, real-time messages with push notifications, and follower system
projects.thumbnail: Social network feed with posts, likes, real-time chat, and nested comment interactions
projects.longDescription: SMOSpace is a feature-rich social networking platform built with React 19 and TypeScript. It supports rich post creation with TipTap editor and image uploads, nested comments (up to 4 levels), a full friend/follower system, and a real-time live chat powered by Socket.IO. Redux Toolkit handles global state, Zod + React Hook Form ensure robust form validation, and Framer Motion delivers smooth UI animations throughout the app.
outcomes: Real-time notifications and live chat with Socket.IO and push notifications
Nested comment system supporting up to 4 levels of replies
Rich post editor with TipTap, image uploads, reactions, and re-post support
Type-safe codebase with full TypeScript and Zod schema validation
features: Post creation with rich text editor (TipTap) and image uploads
Like, react, re-post and share posts
Nested comment threads (up to 4 levels deep)
Real-time live chat with online/offline status and read receipts
Customizable user profiles with avatar and cover photo
User search and activity feed discovery

projects.title: E-commerce Platform
projects.description: Full-featured e-commerce platform with product management, cart, admin dashboard, rich text editor, and AWS S3 media storage
projects.problemSolved: Built a complete fullstack e-commerce system with JWT auth, product catalog, cart & order flow, role-based admin dashboard, Redis caching, AWS S3 file uploads, and email notifications
projects.thumbnail: E-commerce product showcase and checkout flow
projects.longDescription: A production-grade fullstack e-commerce platform with a Next.js 16 (App Router) + React 19 frontend and a NestJS 11 backend. The frontend uses React Query for server state, Zustand for client state, TipTap for rich product descriptions, Recharts for analytics dashboards, and Framer Motion for animations. The backend is powered by NestJS with Prisma 7 + PostgreSQL for data persistence, Redis (IORedis) for caching and sessions, AWS S3 for media uploads, Mailtrap for transactional emails, and Pino for structured logging. Auth is handled via JWT + Passport with bcryptjs password hashing.
outcomes: Complete product catalog with rich text descriptions, filtering, and search
Cart and order management with role-based access control (admin / customer)
Admin dashboard with inventory tracking, order management, and Recharts analytics
Redis caching layer for high-performance API responses
AWS S3 integration for scalable product image and media storage
Transactional email system via Mailtrap for order confirmations and notifications
features: Product catalog with TipTap rich text editor and image uploads to AWS S3
Shopping cart and multi-step order flow
Role-based admin dashboard with Recharts analytics
Redis caching for sessions and frequently accessed data
Prisma 7 ORM with PostgreSQL schema migrations
Fully type-safe with TypeScript and Zod validation on both frontend and backend

projects.title: Portfolio IDE
projects.description: VS Code-inspired portfolio website with a terminal, file explorer, and AI copilot
projects.problemSolved: Created a unique developer-style portfolio that showcases skills in an interactive IDE interface
projects.thumbnail: IDE-style portfolio with file explorer and tabbed editor interface
projects.longDescription: An IDE-inspired portfolio that mimics the look and feel of VS Code. Features a file explorer sidebar, tabbed editor, integrated terminal, and an AI copilot assistant. Built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS for maximum performance and customization.
outcomes: Unique portfolio UX that stands out in job applications
AI copilot powered by Gemini API for interactive Q&A
Fast, SEO-optimized with Next.js App Router

projects.title: Discord Bot
projects.description: Feature-rich Discord bot with moderation, music, and utility commands
projects.problemSolved: Automated server management and entertainment for Discord communities
projects.thumbnail: Discord bot command interface with music and moderation features
projects.longDescription: A Discord bot built with Discord.js and TypeScript, featuring moderation commands, music playback, and custom utility commands. Deployed and serving multiple Discord communities.
outcomes: Automated moderation reducing manual admin workload

projects.title: Design System UI Library
projects.description: Reusable component library for building consistent UIs across multiple projects
projects.problemSolved: Reduced development time through standardized, accessible components with TypeScript support
projects.thumbnail: Collection of reusable UI components and design tokens
projects.longDescription: A typed, accessible component library built on top of Shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS. Documented with Storybook, it standardizes design tokens and component patterns across multiple personal projects.
outcomes: Reduced UI development time across personal projects
Consistent design language across the portfolio
features: Custom React components on Shadcn/ui base
